reason: Hardcoded schema file path .brom_schema.json is safe from traversal.
run_migrations uses canonicalized paths with starts_with bounds checking.
run_rollback uses canonicalized paths with starts_with bounds checking.

All table/column identifiers validated via validate_sql_identifier() (char-class whitelist + reserved-word blocklist). Data payloads use parameterized queries via rusqlite::params_from_iter(). Inline narsil-ignore comments also present.
Test fixture string inside #[cfg(test)] mod tests. Not compiled into production binary.
Form field binding (password: password_val). Narsil pattern-matches the variable name 'password' — no actual hardcoded credential.
Startup panics for invalid CORS configuration per coding-standard.md §4.10 fail-fast pattern.
Startup expect() for BROM_CORS_ORIGINS env var per coding-standard.md §4.10 fail-fast pattern.
Guarded .expect() on chars.next() preceded by is_empty() check. Provably infallible.
